title: acrotriche dura
intro: Acrotriche dura, also known as scrub cypress or prickly scrub, is a shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acrotriche dura are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, Acrotriche dura is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
